data.name: Hentai World Mystery
data.detailed_description:
Step into the Hentai World Mystery, where sharp thinking and careful strategy lead to victory. Your mission is simple yet challenging: clear the grid without detonating any hidden mines. Use logic and deduction to uncover safe tiles while marking suspected mines with flags. Each revealed number gives you clues about how many mines lie nearby, guiding your next move.

Enjoy clean, intuitive controls and a minimalist interface that keeps the focus on the puzzle. Whether you want a quick brain teaser or a longer strategic session, Hentai World Mystery delivers endless fun and mental exercise. Sharpen your skills, test your patience, and enjoy the satisfying feeling of clearing the board one safe tile at a time!

Features:

Reveal stunning and captivating images of beautiful girls with every completed game.

Relax with calming background music that sets a peaceful mood.

Access full-screen view to admire the complete picture after solving each level.

No time pressure—take your time and enjoy the game at your own rhythm.

data.short_description: Hentai World Mystery is a puzzle game where you clear tiles using logic to avoid hidden mines. Use clues to flag dangers and reveal safe spots. It features simple controls and sharpens your thinking with each careful move.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 音效卡: 512MB
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:

  • OS *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • Processor: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 512MB
